free_text: Incident energy dependence of isotopic yield
distributions of target-like and fission-like
products in N-14 induced reaction on Ni-62.
40 cm3 Ge(Li) detector
Enriched Ni-62 targets (98.83%
enrichment) of self-supporting metallic foils
1.0 - 2.0 mg/cm2 thick were prepared by the
electrodeposition method.
SD:Updated to new date formats, lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. COMMENT, ADD-RES deleted.
Subents 002,003 were split.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
/By authors/ Cobalt isotopes Co-61,Co-60,Co-58 be
considered free from the effect of parents. Although,
yields of the parent nuclides of Co-57 and Co-56,
namely, Ni-57 and Ni-56, were sought, they were found
below the detection limit, at least one order of
magnitude smaller corresponding cobalt isotope yields
No information about source of uncertainty
Fig.1
Energy values were taken from the bottom of the fig.4.
SD: SF5=IND and SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code. DATA-ERR -> ERR-DIG; ERR-T -> DATA-ERR.
Energy values were re-compiled (see STATUS). Subent
was split (see Subents 004-008).
SD: STATUS updated.
/By authors/ SC-48, SC-46g, SC-44m be considered free
from the effect of parents.
No information about source of uncertainty
Fig.2
Energy values were taken from the bottom of the fig.5.
SD: SF5=IND and SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code. DATA-ERR -> ERR-DIG; ERR-T -> DATA-ERR.
Energy values were re-compiled (see STATUS). Subent
was split (see Subents 009-011).
